context: Greater Hope Baptist Church reimbursement policy for deacons and ministry volunteers submitting building-fund and program expenses.
policy_name: Greater Hope Baptist Church Volunteer Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.action: Reject submission and return to volunteer
validation_rules.notes: Itemized receipts must show vendor, date, and amount.
validation_rules.requirement: Original receipt required for every expense over $25.00

validation_rules.notes: Treasurer Shawn Dawson reviews and countersigns before payment.
Late requests reviewed case by case at monthly meeting.
validation_rules.requirement: Submit within 30 days of the purchase date

validation_rules.notes: Personal and non-ministry purchases are not eligible.
validation_rules.requirement: Expense must be tied to an approved church or league activity
